pythonScripts.name: Temperature Trend Analysis
pythonScripts.code:
# Temperature Trend Analysis Script
# Demonstrates: TrendLine, SignalFilter, publish()

# Create instances (persisted between calls via vars)
if 'trend' not in vars:
    vars['trend'] = TrendLine(window=300)  # 5 min window at 1 Hz
    vars['filter'] = SignalFilter(tau=10.0, dt=1.0)  # 10 sec time constant

trend = vars['trend']
filt = vars['filter']

# Get smoothed supply temperature
smoothed = filt.update(tags['TT-101'])

# Update trend analysis
result = trend.update(smoothed)

# Convert slope to deg/min (samples are 1 sec apart)
slope_per_min = result['slope'] * 60

publish('CALC-TrendSlope', slope_per_min, units='degC/min')

# Predict temperature in 5 minutes
if result['r_squared'] > 0.7:  # Only trust strong trends
    predicted = trend.predict(steps_ahead=300)
    if predicted > 40:  # Will exceed warning in 5 min
        publish('TempPredictAlarm', 1)
pythonScripts.description: Uses TrendLine helper to predict temperature rise and alert early

pythonScripts.name: Filter Life Estimation
pythonScripts.code:
# Filter Life Estimation Script
# Demonstrates: LookupTable, SignalFilter

if 'dp_filter' not in vars:
    vars['dp_filter'] = SignalFilter(alpha=0.05)  # Heavy smoothing
    # Calibration: DP (kPa) -> Remaining Life (%)
    # New filter = 5 kPa, Replace at 75 kPa
    vars['life_table'] = LookupTable([
        (5, 100),    # New filter
        (20, 80),    # Light loading
        (40, 50),    # Medium loading  
        (60, 20),    # Heavy loading
        (75, 0)      # Replace immediately
    ])

# Smooth the DP reading
smoothed_dp = vars['dp_filter'].update(tags['PDT-101'])

# Look up remaining life
life_pct = vars['life_table'](smoothed_dp)

publish('CALC-FilterLife', life_pct, units='%')

pythonScripts.name: Vibration Monitoring with FFT
pythonScripts.code:
# Vibration Analysis Script
# Demonstrates: SpectralAnalysis, PeakDetector, RingBuffer
# Note: SpectralAnalysis only available on DAQ, not cRIO

if 'vib_spec' not in vars:
    vars['vib_spec'] = SpectralAnalysis(window_size=256, sample_rate=50.0)
    vars['vib_peaks'] = PeakDetector(min_height=0.5, min_distance=10)
    vars['vib_history'] = RingBuffer(size=600)  # 10 min history

spec = vars['vib_spec']
peaks = vars['vib_peaks']
history = vars['vib_history']

# Add pump vibration sample
vib = tags['VT-101']
spec.update(vib)
history.append(vib)

# Check for peaks (bearing defect detection)
peak = peaks.update(vib)
if peak and peak['height'] > 10:
    publish('VibrationPeakAlarm', peak['height'])

# FFT analysis when buffer is full
if spec.ready:
    result = spec.analyze()
    if result:
        publish('DominantFreq', result['dominant_freq'], units='Hz')
        
        # Check for bearing fault frequencies
        # BPFO typically at 6-8x shaft speed
        if 25 < result['dominant_freq'] < 35:  # Assuming ~5 Hz shaft
            publish('BearingFaultWarning', 1)

pythonScripts.name: SPC Quality Monitoring
pythonScripts.code:
# Statistical Process Control Script
# Demonstrates: SPCChart with Western Electric rules
# Note: SPCChart only available on DAQ, not cRIO

if 'spc' not in vars:
    vars['spc'] = SPCChart(subgroup_size=5, num_subgroups=25)
    vars['spc'].set_spec_limits(lsl=12.0, usl=38.0)  # Spec limits for supply temp
    vars['sample_count'] = 0

spc = vars['spc']

# Add supply temp sample
spc.add_sample(tags['TT-101'])
vars['sample_count'] += 1

# Publish SPC metrics every 25 samples (5 subgroups)
if vars['sample_count'] >= 25:
    vars['sample_count'] = 0
    
    publish('SPC_Xbar', spc.x_bar)
    publish('SPC_UCL', spc.ucl)
    publish('SPC_LCL', spc.lcl)
    publish('SPC_Cpk', spc.cpk)
    
    # Check control rules
    violations = spc.check_rules()
    if violations:
        publish('SPC_OutOfControl', 1)
        # Log first violation
        publish('SPC_Violation', violations[0][:50])  # Truncate for display
    else:
        publish('SPC_OutOfControl', 0)

pythonScripts.name: Adaptive Pump Speed Control
pythonScripts.code:
# Adaptive Pump Speed Control
# Demonstrates: BiquadFilter, RampSoak
# Note: BiquadFilter only available on DAQ, not cRIO

if 'pump_filter' not in vars:
    # 2nd order Butterworth low-pass at 0.5 Hz (anti-hunting)
    vars['pump_filter'] = BiquadFilter.lowpass(cutoff_hz=0.5, sample_rate=10.0, q=0.707)
    
    # Setpoint profile for gradual changes
    vars['sp_profile'] = RampSoak([
        {'type': 'ramp', 'target': 80, 'rate': 5},  # Ramp to 80% at 5%/min
        {'type': 'soak', 'duration': 300},           # Hold for 5 min
    ])

filt = vars['pump_filter']
profile = vars['sp_profile']

# Filter the delta-T signal for smooth control
delta_t = tags['TT-102'] - tags['TT-101']
smooth_dt = filt.process(delta_t)

# Simple proportional control: target 15°C delta-T
target_dt = 15.0
error = smooth_dt - target_dt

# Adjust pump speed (higher delta-T = increase flow)
current_speed = tags['AO-VFD-101']
new_speed = current_speed - error * 2.0  # P-gain = 2
new_speed = max(30, min(100, new_speed))  # Clamp 30-100%

outputs['AO-VFD-101'] = new_speed
publish('PumpSpeedCmd', new_speed, units='%')

pythonScripts.name: Custom Data Logger
pythonScripts.code:
# Custom Data Logger Script
# Demonstrates: DataLog, Counter

if 'logger' not in vars:
    vars['logger'] = DataLog('efficiency')
    vars['pue_counter'] = Counter()
    vars['last_log_time'] = 0

logger = vars['logger']
counter = vars['pue_counter']

# Log efficiency metrics every 60 seconds
current_time = now()
if current_time - vars['last_log_time'] >= 60:
    vars['last_log_time'] = current_time
    
    # Calculate current PUE
    it_power = tags['WT-101'] + tags['WT-201']
    total_power = it_power + tags['WT-301'] + tags['WT-401'] + tags['WT-501']
    pue = total_power / it_power if it_power > 100 else 1.0
    
    # Log multiple values at once
    logger.log_dict({
        'pue': pue,
        'it_load_kw': it_power,
        'cooling_kw': total_power - it_power,
        'supply_temp': tags['TT-101'],
        'return_temp': tags['TT-102']
    })
    
    # Mark significant events
    if pue > 1.5:
        logger.mark('high_pue_event')
        counter.increment()
    
    publish('HighPUECount', counter.count)

interlocks.name: Pump Required for Valves
interlocks.condition: (XV-101 == true OR XV-201 == true) AND P-101 == false AND P-102 == false
